creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
Hello all,

I maintained 3 different ports (stable for old systems, stable for new systems and LTS) in the past which created a lot of work for committers. I therefore decided to only have 2 ports in the tree, stable and LTS. I'm not sure if it is worth to maintain 3 versions of this port again in future, from my point of view www/typo3 and www/typo3-lts is enough. So I suggest to update www/typo3 to version 8 and www/typo3-lts to version 7 but I'm open for suggestions.

Helmut
